goal: Add a side-effect-free final decision gate for BPK-078 release governance runbook evidence, accepting explicit approve/defer/reject decisions without GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, packages, or deployment.
scope_out: Do not read files, call GitHub, create PRs, merge, write files, change workflows, change package files, change deployment files, or mutate external state.
claims: Release governance runbook evidence can be converted to a final decision without executing actions.
Ready BPK-078 evidence and explicit decision refs are required.
Merge and external actions remain false.
assumptions: Approved final decision gates only authorize a later human/operator action, not a merge in this task.
dod: Approved, missing decision ref, and rejected or blocked evidence cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Filesystem reads, GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, package changes, deployment changes, or external state mutation become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-078 bundled release governance runbook evidence without executing actions.
